items.title: Tesla To Cease One-Time Sale Of FSD In Favor Of Subscription Model
items.description: Starting Sunday, users can only subscribe to full self-driving technology for $99/ month.

items.title: Dutch Bros Climbs On Q4 Beat — How Much Upside Does Wall Street See?

items.title: ROKU Stock Is Rallying Today – What Is Making Traders So Bullish?
items.description: The company said it expects Q1 2026 total net revenue of $1.200 billion, up roughly 18% from a year ago.

items.title: Novo Nordisk To Meet Wegovy Pill Demand In US Before Expanding To Avoid Supply Shortage, Says CEO Doustdar
items.description: Novo is looking to ensure the U.S. market is supplied before choosing another country to scale in, Doustdar said in an interview with CNBC.
